summary: Comprehensive testing of BeraArb Berachain arbitrage trading system completed. Backend APIs show 100% success rate with all 15 endpoints working perfectly including the critical execute-trade endpoint with comprehensive safety checks. Frontend loads correctly with all UI elements functional, but WebSocket real-time connection has connectivity issues preventing live opportunity updates.

minor_issues.issue: Gas price values display in scientific notation (2.6083e-05 gwei) making them hard to read
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic display issue only, functionality works correctly

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard shows 'Reconnecting...' status and opportunities don't load via WebSocket
integration_issues.impact: Real-time updates not working, but manual API calls return opportunities correctly
integration_issues.root_cause: WebSocket endpoint may not be properly exposed through Kubernetes ingress or network restrictions
integration_issues.workaround: Opportunities API works via REST calls - could implement polling fallback

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/health returns healthy with RPC connected (Block: 17913199)
✅ GET /api/opportunities returns list of 3 active arbitrage opportunities
✅ POST /api/execute-trade validates inputs correctly (rejects invalid pairs, addresses, excessive slippage)
✅ POST /api/execute-trade performs comprehensive safety checks (trade size, gas limits, profit thresholds)
✅ POST /api/execute-trade returns proper transaction structure with execution_id and verification data
✅ POST /api/execute-trade correctly rejects trades when profit < gas cost or below minimum threshold
✅ All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ Dashboard page loads with all UI components (stat cards, opportunities table, sidebar)
✅ Trade modal opens when clicking opportunities (slippage slider, execute/cancel buttons)
✅ Wallet connect button is visible and clickable on all pages
✅ Navigation between Dashboard, Analytics, Settings works correctly
✅ Analytics page loads with proper 'Connect Your Wallet' prompt
✅ Settings page loads with 3 trading configuration sliders and auto-execute toggle
✅ All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ Gas recommendations sidebar shows current gas pricing
✅ Portfolio section correctly shows wallet connection requirement
✅ DEX quote endpoint returns accurate price data for arbitrage calculations

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All APIs including execute-trade endpoint working perfectly with comprehensive safety checks
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - All core UI functionality working, WebSocket connectivity issue preventing real-time updates

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connectivity issue. The WebSocket endpoint at /ws/prices may not be properly exposed through Kubernetes ingress. Consider: 1) Verify WebSocket routes in ingress configuration, 2) Check if WebSocket upgrades are allowed, 3) Implement REST API polling fallback if WebSocket issues persist. Opportunities API works perfectly via REST, so data is available.
